articles.title: At least 100 deaths reported in Ebola outbreak in DR Congo as six Americans exposed
articles.summary: One of the six Americans is experiencing symptoms, according to media reports. One province in Congo reports 390 cases.

articles.title: What is Ebola and why is stopping this outbreak so difficult?
articles.summary: An outbreak of Ebola in DR Congo involves a rare strain and is in an area affected by conflict.

articles.title: Death toll from Israeli strikes on Lebanon passes 3,000, officials say
articles.summary: It marks a grim milestone in the conflict between Israel and the Lebanese armed group Hezbollah since March, despite a nominal ceasefire.

articles.title: Judge rules gun and writings are admissible in Luigi Mangione's New York murder trial
articles.summary: Other items found with Mangione at a Pennsylvania McDonald's will not be allowed to be presented in court, the judge ruled.

articles.title: Former Google CEO Eric Schmidt booed by graduates at mention of AI
articles.summary: The reaction underscores a growing anxiety among students over AI's impact on jobs and their future careers.

articles.title: Four killed in protests during Kenyan strikes over high fuel prices
articles.summary: Thousands of commuters are stranded, with key roads in the capital Nairobi largely empty due to the protests over fuel costs.

articles.title: Bodies of missing Italian divers found in Maldives
